name_cn:
New Spring 25 LouLou Suede
Soft to the touch, comes with a detachable card holder and full-label mirror. Features a sliding chain, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear to meet various outfit needs!
Suede material makes the bag look especially exquisite. Size: 25x12x6cm. Style: 1Y821749
